rent.source: nomadexpenses.com Da Nang cost of living 2026
rent.note: furnished 1BR near My Khe beach or nomad area; $350-500 range

utilities.note: electric + water + fiber internet; A/C usage moderate

groceries.note: local wet markets + Han Market; affordable fresh produce

diningOut.source: nomadexpenses.com Da Nang cost of living 2026
diningOut.note: mix of Vietnamese street food + Western beach cafes; $250-350/mo range

coworking.source: nomadexpenses.com Da Nang cost of living 2026
coworking.note: hot-desk monthly; $80-120 range; solid coworking scene

misc.source: nomadexpenses.com Da Nang cost of living 2026
misc.note: gym, massages, entertainment, personal care; $150-250/mo lifestyle range

accomSeasonality._doc: 12 monthly multipliers applied to RENT ONLY (Jan..Dec). 1.0 = base. Raise for peak tourist/weather months, lower for off-peak.

evidence.claim: Da Nang comfortable solo beach nomad budget $1,000-1,300/month; rent $350-500
evidence.quote: Comfortable solo beach lifestyle: about $1,000–1,300 USD. Rent: $350–500 USD for a modern one bedroom near My Khe

evidence.claim: Da Nang food/coffee $250-350, coworking $80-120, transport $50-80, lifestyle $150-250
evidence.quote: Food & coffee: $250–350 USD for a mix of Vietnamese eats, Western cafes, and weekly brunches. Coworking: $80–120 USD. Transport: $50–80 USD

evidence.claim: Forbes named Da Nang one of top 8 digital nomad cities for 2026
evidence.quote: Forbes named Da Nang one of the world's top 8 digital nomad cities for 2026

evidence.claim: Lean Da Nang solo nomad budget $750-900; comfortable $1,000-1,300
evidence.quote: Lean solo nomad: roughly $750–900 USD; Comfortable solo beach lifestyle: about $1,000–1,300 USD
